hero.title:
Get home safe,
every time.
hero.subtitle: Volvé automatically alerts your emergency contacts if you don't make it home safely. No check-in needed — it works in the background.

features.title: Everything you need to stay safe
features.subtitle: Simple to set up, powerful when it matters most.

items.title: Safety timer
items.description: Set a session with who you're meeting, where, and when you'll be back. If you don't check in, your contacts are alerted automatically.

items.title: Panic button
items.description: One press sends an immediate alert to your emergency contacts with your real-time location. No setup needed.

items.title: Duress code
items.description: If someone forces you to disable the alarm, enter a secret code. The app appears to turn off — but silently sends the alert.

items.title: Live location sharing
items.description: Your route is tracked during active sessions and shared with contacts when an alert is triggered.

items.title: Multi-channel alerts
items.description: Emergency contacts receive alerts via WhatsApp and email with your location, route, and session details.

items.title: Private by design
items.description: Your safety codes are stored only on your device's secure keychain. Never in the cloud.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to stay protected.

steps.title: Set up a session
steps.description: Enter who you're meeting, the location, and your estimated return time.

steps.title: Go out safely
steps.description: Volvé runs in the background, tracking your route and watching the clock.

steps.title: Check in when you're home
steps.description: Enter your code to disarm. If you don't — your contacts are alerted automatically.

download.title: Download Volvé
download.subtitle: Available for iPhone. Free to download.
